title: PUT uses zero-value sentinels, so year=0 or clearing a string field is impossible
evidence: app.go:196-211 — empty title/author/isbn and year==0 fall back to existing values
suggestion: Use pointer fields (*string/*int) in UpdateBookRequest to distinguish omitted from zero, or document PUT as merge-only

title: main() and file-backed initDB path are uncovered (coverage 58.2%)
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.582; tests use in-memory :memory: DB via TestMain, main()/initDB('./books.db') never executed
suggestion: Optionally add a smoke test for initDB, though the six handlers are all exercised
